log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 6 falling damage. HP: 172/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 44/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 26/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 10/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration.
→ Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration healed for 8 HP. HP: 18/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
